hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); print(f'[security] Blocked .env read') or __import__('sys').exit(2) if p.endswith('.env') and not p.endswith('.env.example') else None"

python3 -c "import json,sys,re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); patterns=[('rm\\s+-rf?\\s+\\.','rm -rf on project'),('git\\s+push.*--force','force push'),('git\\s+reset\\s+--hard','reset --hard')]; [print(f'[safety] Blocked: {r}') or sys.exit(2) for p,r in patterns if re.search(p,cmd,re.I)]"

python3 -c "import json,sys,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); r=subprocess.run(['python3','-m','py_compile',p],capture_output=True,text=True) if p.endswith('.py') else type('',(),{'returncode':0})(); print(r.stderr) or sys.exit(2) if r.returncode else None"
